label: Schedule Transformer
description: A transformer that sets a global timer, clears and resets the timer if a new message arrives before it completes, and optionally restores state.

inputs.label: Timer Duration
inputs.name: timerDuration
inputs.description: The duration of the timer in milliseconds.

inputs.label: Immediate Restore
inputs.name: immediateRestore
inputs.description: A flag indicating whether to restore the state immediately after clearing the timer.

outputs.label: Restore State
outputs.name: restoreState
outputs.description: The state to restore to if immediateRestore is enabled.
